rows.headline: RevOps lead blocked on attribution export ahead of board meeting. Support ticket shows reporting gap under time pressure.

metadata.variant_angle: Social-proof-led: frame the post around observed customer or market signals without adding unsupported testimonials.

sections.body_markdown: Atlas Supply. Morgan Reyes is Revenue Operations Lead. Contact: ops@atlas-supply.example. Current FlowPilot customer.
sections.title: Account Context

sections.body_markdown: Support ticket filed: "How do I export attribution reports before our board meeting?" Ticket title: "Attribution export blocked." Time-sensitive request tied to board presentation deadline. Support evidence points to reporting export limitation under deadline pressure.
sections.title: Recent Signals

sections.body_markdown: Lead with the board meeting deadline. Ask what attribution data they need to present and what format the board expects. Confirm whether this is a one-time export need or a recurring gap. If recurring, position expanded reporting tier or custom export capability. If one-time, offer manual export assist to protect the board presentation.
sections.title: Talking Points

sections.body_markdown: Morgan may already be evaluating tools with native export. Board pressure creates urgency but also comparison risk. If FlowPilot cannot deliver before the meeting, the gap becomes visible to executive stakeholders. Do not promise export features that require engineering work unless delivery timeline is confirmed.
sections.title: Risks and Objections

sections.body_markdown: Confirm board meeting date. Check whether attribution export is available in current tier or requires upgrade. If upgrade required, get pricing and timeline to Morgan within 24 hours. If manual export is the only option, assign support resource and set delivery date before board meeting. Follow up post-meeting to assess whether this becomes a renewal blocker.
sections.title: Next Actions

rows.title: Pre-call brief: Atlas Supply -- Board-driven reporting urgency

rows.headline: RevOps lead needs attribution exports before board meeting. Current tooling can't deliver. Renewal window opens next quarter.

metadata.variant_angle: Outcome-led: lead with the business result the audience wants, then connect the supporting evidence to that result.

sections.body_markdown: Atlas Supply. Morgan Reyes runs Revenue Operations. They use FlowPilot for attribution tracking. Board meeting creates immediate reporting deadline.
sections.title: Account Context

sections.body_markdown: Support ticket filed asking how to export attribution reports. The question came with a board meeting deadline attached. Export capability is blocked in their current setup.
sections.title: Recent Signals

sections.body_markdown: Lead with the board deadline. Morgan needs attribution data out of the system before the meeting. Ask what format the board expects and what attribution model they're running. If FlowPilot can't export it, that's a retention risk. If you can solve it, solve it now. If you can't, tell them what workaround exists and when the feature ships.
sections.title: Talking Points

sections.body_markdown: If export is locked behind a higher tier, Morgan will ask why they're paying for attribution they can't report. If it's a feature gap, they'll ask when it ships. If the workaround is manual CSV pulls, they'll ask why they need FlowPilot at all. Board pressure shortens their patience window.
sections.title: Risks and Objections

sections.body_markdown: Check their plan tier and export entitlements before the call. Confirm board meeting date. If export is available, walk them through it. If it's not, escalate to product and give Morgan a timeline. Do not let this ticket sit unresolved past the board meeting.
sections.title: Next Actions

rows.title: Pre-call brief: Atlas Supply -- Board reporting blocked

rows.headline: RevOps lead needs attribution exports before board meeting. Current tooling blocks critical reporting workflow.

metadata.variant_angle: Pain-led: open with the customer's current friction, then show how the evidence supports the recommended next step.

sections.body_markdown: Atlas Supply. Morgan Reyes is Revenue Operations Lead. Contact: ops@atlas-supply.example. Current vendor: FlowPilot.
sections.title: Account Context

sections.body_markdown: Support ticket filed asking how to export attribution reports before a board meeting. The question points to a blocked workflow at a high-stakes deadline.
sections.title: Recent Signals

sections.body_markdown: Lead with the board deadline. Ask what attribution data the board expects and what format they need. If FlowPilot cannot export it, that is the opening. Do not pitch features. Ask what happens if the report does not arrive.
sections.title: Talking Points

sections.body_markdown: Morgan may have already found a workaround or manual export path. The board meeting may have passed. Confirm timing before positioning a solution.
sections.title: Risks and Objections

sections.body_markdown: Confirm board meeting date. Ask if the export issue is resolved. If not, offer a demo of your attribution export workflow. If yes, ask what other reporting gaps exist.
sections.title: Next Actions

rows.title: Pre-call brief: Atlas Supply -- Attribution export blocked
